creator: hatanou@infolab.ne.jp
text:
Mozc 1.3.911.102 is out and japanese/mozc-server has already been updated.
Versions of mozc-server and mozc-el must be same to work.

Fix: Apply this patch.
How-To-Repeat: Update japanese/mozc-server port to 1.3.911.102
and then try using mozc-el.
It will not work.
